mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports ( user_id, report_type, target_id, reason, report_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{reportType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, 'WAITING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT report_id AS reportId, user_id AS userId, report_type AS reportType, target_id AS targetId, reason AS reason, report_status AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY report_id DESC
